name: mirror-collective-emails
description: MJML sources for Echo Vault recipient emails. Compiles to dist/*.html for the Python SES sender.

scripts.build: mjml src/echo-voice.mjml -o dist/echo-voice.html && mjml src/echo-video.mjml -o dist/echo-video.html && mjml src/echo-written.mjml -o dist/echo-written.html
scripts.validate: mjml -v src/echo-voice.mjml && mjml -v src/echo-video.mjml && mjml -v src/echo-written.mjml
